name: vscode-ls-php
description: PHP language extension powered by a Rust language server.

commands.title: VSCode LS PHP: Restart Language Server
VSCode LS PHP: Launch Xdebug Session
VSCode LS PHP: Edit Debug Expression Value
VSCode LS PHP: Add Debug Watch Expression
VSCode LS PHP: Start Multi-Session Debug
VSCode LS PHP: Stop Multi-Session Debug
VSCode LS PHP: Start Laravel Dev Server
VSCode LS PHP: Stop Laravel Dev Server
VSCode LS PHP: Write Xdebug Template
VSCode LS PHP: Write DBGp Proxy Template
VSCode LS PHP: Inspect Xdebug Profiles
VSCode LS PHP: Start Continuous Testing
VSCode LS PHP: Stop Continuous Testing
VSCode LS PHP: Open Profiling Dashboard
VSCode LS PHP: Reset Profiling Metrics
VSCode LS PHP: Batch Format Workspace

vscodeLsPhp.serverPath.description: Optional absolute path to the Rust language server binary.

vscodeLsPhp.phpExecutable.description: PHP executable used for PHPUnit/Pest/Artisan test runs.

vscodeLsPhp.debugAutoStartServer.description: Automatically start PHP built-in web server before launching Xdebug.

vscodeLsPhp.debugServerHost.description: Host interface used for the auto-started debug PHP web server.

vscodeLsPhp.debugServerPort.description: Port used for the auto-started debug PHP web server.

vscodeLsPhp.debugServerDocroot.description: Document root (relative to workspace) used by the auto-started debug PHP web server.

vscodeLsPhp.laravelDevServerEnabled.description: Use Laravel dev server assistance for debug workflow.

vscodeLsPhp.laravelDevServerHost.description: Host interface used by Laravel dev server assistance.

vscodeLsPhp.laravelDevServerPort.description: Port used by Laravel dev server assistance.

vscodeLsPhp.laravelDevServerCommand.description: Command used to run the Laravel dev server; --host and --port are appended when missing.

vscodeLsPhp.enableCompoundLaunchTemplate.description: Generate VSCode LS PHP compound launch templates and a container mapping debug profile in launch.json.

vscodeLsPhp.xdebugUseDbgpProxy.description: Enable DBGp proxy guidance in generated Xdebug templates and launch metadata.

vscodeLsPhp.xdebugProxyHost.description: DBGp proxy host used in generated template guidance and launch metadata.

vscodeLsPhp.xdebugProxyPort.description: DBGp proxy port used in generated template guidance and launch metadata.

vscodeLsPhp.xdebugIdeKey.description: IDE key written to xdebug.ini and used for DBGp proxy guidance.

vscodeLsPhp.xdebugProfilePath.description: Optional absolute or workspace-relative path where Xdebug profile files are stored.

vscodeLsPhp.xdebugProfileGlob.description: Glob pattern used to discover Xdebug profile files.

vscodeLsPhp.phpunitBinary.description: Relative path to PHPUnit binary from workspace root.

vscodeLsPhp.pestBinary.description: Relative path to Pest binary from workspace root.

vscodeLsPhp.enableContinuousTesting.description: Automatically rerun tests on changes under tests/**/*.php when continuous testing is enabled.

vscodeLsPhp.testPreTask.description: Optional shell command to run once before a test run starts.

vscodeLsPhp.testPostTask.description: Optional shell command to run once after a test run ends.

vscodeLsPhp.formatOnSave.description: Automatically format PHP/Blade files with the language server formatter on save.

vscodeLsPhp.formatOnPaste.description: Automatically format the pasted range with the language server formatter when pasting into PHP/Blade files.

vscodeLsPhp.formatStylePreset.description: Formatting normalization profile preset (currently maps to lightweight whitespace/directive rules).

vscodeLsPhp.formatMaxBlankLines.description: Maximum consecutive blank lines retained by the formatter.

vscodeLsPhp.formatTrimTrailingWhitespace.description: Trim trailing whitespace from formatted lines.

vscodeLsPhp.enableLocalWholeLineSuggesti.description: Enable local-only whole-line inline suggestions for PHP and Blade.

vscodeLsPhp.localWholeLineMinPrefixLengt.description: Minimum non-whitespace prefix length before local whole-line suggestions appear.
